description: Firewall test VM C — webserver in test_pinhole zone (used by firewall/test.sh --deep). Provider for the auto-pinhole (#173) live test: consumer test-fw-a in test_allow_a depends on test-fw-c:web, which triggers a cross-zone pinhole into test_pinhole because test_allow_a is in test_pinhole.pinhole-allowed-from but NOT in test_pinhole.access-to.
